sections.paragraph:
- Original: τούτῳ

- Transliteration: Touto

- Phonetic: too'-to

- Definition:

1. to this one

- Origin: dative case singular masculine or neuter of G3778

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Dative singular masculine or neuter of G3778; to (in with or by) this (person or thing): - here [-by -in] him one the same there [-in] this.
